title: Senior Manager Structured Finance & Refinancing | OTTO Payments (w/m/d)
required_skills: Completed degree in business administration/economics, ideally specialising in finance
Several years of experience and proven track record in developing and implementing various refinancing instruments
Extensive international network in refinancing (banks, institutional investors)
Extensive negotiation experience with financing partners
Strong analytical skills and strategic thinking
bonus_skills: Industry experience in banking or retail environment
Knowledge of specific instruments: Factoring, ABS, Mezzanine, securitisation
matched_skills: Completed degree (Master of Management & Entrepreneurship) — satisfies education requirement
Strong analytical skills and structured thinking — generic transferable skill
Stakeholder reporting and executive communication at HSBC — very limited partial overlap
missing_skills: No structured finance or refinancing experience whatsoever (Factoring, ABS, Mezzanine, securitisation)
No negotiation experience with financing partners or banks
No experience developing refinancing strategies or instruments
No risk management in financial instrument context
German B1 is far below the negotiation-level German required
No background in payment, banking, or financial services product structuring
core_responsibilities: Analyse current and future refinancing needs
Develop innovative refinancing strategies and evaluate potential instruments
Design and implement refinancing instruments (Factoring, ABS, Mezzanine, securitisation)
Build and maintain relationships with banks, investors, rating agencies
Risk management: identify, assess and manage instrument-related risks
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable — do not apply
Structured finance and capital markets are highly specialised domains far removed from the candidate's PMO and project coordination background
German B1 is a disqualifying factor for negotiation-level German required in banking contexts
The USD 8M budget governance at HSBC does not constitute finance/treasury experience
summary: Poor match at 10.0%. This is a senior structured finance specialist role requiring deep expertise in ABS, securitisation, Factoring, IFRS, and bank/investor relationship management. The candidate has no structured finance, treasury, or capital markets background. German B1 vs negotiation-level German is a further disqualifying gap. Not recommended for application.
